allow: Bash(SERVICE_NAME=user-service npx tsx -e "import\('./api/index.ts'\).then\(m => { console.log\('LOADED, default handler type:', typeof m.default\); process.exit\(0\); }\).catch\(e => { console.error\('LOAD FAILED:', e\); process.exit\(1\); }\);")

Bash(SERVICE_NAME=user-service npx tsx -e "import\('./api/index.ts'\).then\(m => { const h = typeof m.default === 'function' ? m.default : m.default?.default; console.log\('resolved handler is function:', typeof h === 'function', '| length\(args\):', h?.length\); process.exit\(0\); }\);")
